tasks.label: MicroPython: Flash firmware
tasks.command: esptool.py --chip esp32 --port ${input:serialPort} erase_flash && esptool.py --chip esp32 --port ${input:serialPort} --baud 460800 write_flash -z 0x1000 ${input:firmwareBin}

tasks.label: MicroPython: Upload Python files
tasks.command: ampy --port ${input:serialPort} put main.py && ampy --port ${input:serialPort} put bb_gatt_server.py && ampy --port ${input:serialPort} put ads1231_bb.py && ampy --port ${input:serialPort} put config.py && ampy --port ${input:serialPort} put utils.py && ampy --port ${input:serialPort} put ble_advertising.py

inputs.description: Enter the serial port for your ESP32 (e.g. /dev/ttyUSB0 or /dev/tty.SLAB_USBtoUART)
Enter the path to the MicroPython firmware binary
